mapper.sql: SELECT order_id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, express_company, tracking_no, pay_time, deliver_time, finish_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM ps5_order
mapper.select: WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ps5_order (order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, remark, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, '0', #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: UPDATE ps5_order SET status = '1', pay_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = '0'
UPDATE ps5_order SET status = '6', update_time = sysdate() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = '5'
UPDATE ps5_order SET status = '2', express_company = #{expressCompany}, tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, deliver_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = '1'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ps5_order_item (order_id, game_id, game_name, cover_image, price, quantity) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{gameId}, #{gameName}, #{coverImage}, #{price}, #{quantity})
